about:
Government Engineering College (GEC), Jamui, is a government engineering college in the Jamui district of Bihar. It was established in 2018 under the Department of Science and Technology, Patna, Bihar (now Science, Technology, and Technical Education Department). Initially, it was affiliated with Aryabhatta Knowledge University (AKU) Patna (2018–2022), but now it is affiliated with Bihar Engineering University (BEU) Patna (from March 15, 2023) and approved by AICTE New Delhi (ID: 1-3728477011). College have seven branches in Bachelor of Technology course with annual intake of 60 students in each branch.

Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering (AI & ML), Computer Science & Engineering (Data Science), Computer Science & Engineering (Internet of Things).
